commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Codex-runtime `openai/*` status usage through the effective `openai-codex` auth provider, passes scanned config scope into CLI usage resolution, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main routes Codex auth labels through `openai-codex` but usage lookup still starts from `openai`, and CLI usage omits config/default-agent scope. I did not run a live Codex OAuth quota request in this read-only pass.
